mapper.sql: id, sbv_id, report_url, report_type, test_state, verdict, tested_at, tested_by, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_software_build_version_test_report ( id, sbv_id, report_url, report_type, test_state, verdict, tested_at, tested_by, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{sbvId}, #{reportUrl}, #{reportType}, #{testState}, #{verdict}, #{testedAt}, #{testedBy}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO tb_software_build_version_test_report ( id, sbv_id, report_url, report_type, test_state, verdict, tested_at, tested_by, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.sbvId}, #{item.reportUrl}, #{item.reportType}, #{item.testState}, #{item.verdict}, #{item.testedAt}, #{item.testedBy}, #{item.description}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_software_build_version_test_report t SET
t.sbv_id = #{sbvId},
t.report_url = #{reportUrl},
t.report_type = #{reportType},
t.test_state = #{testState},
t.verdict = #{verdict},
t.tested_at = #{testedAt},
t.tested_by = #{testedBy},
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_software_build_version_test_report t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_software_build_version_test_report t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_software_build_version_test_report t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM tb_software_build_version_test_report t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 ORDER BY t.id DESC
SELECT FROM tb_software_build_version_test_report t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.sbv_id = #{sbvId} ORDER BY t.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_software_build_version_test_report t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_software_build_version_test_report t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.sbv_id = #{sbvId}
